inventory.name: Leather Vest
inventory.description: Simple leather armor offering basic protection.

inventory.name: Minor Healing Potion
inventory.description: A small red potion that restores 30 HP when consumed.

inventory.name: Minor Healing Potion
inventory.description: A small red potion that restores 30 HP when consumed.

inventory.name: Initiate's Tuning Fork
inventory.description: A small silver fork that hums a single pure note when struck. Weak as a weapon, but it cuts through illusion where steel cannot.

inventory.name: Drum-Stave Resonator
inventory.description: A resonant echo of the Obsidian Drum-Stave, keyed to the Note of Matter. One of the five Primordial Instruments.

inventory.name: Silver Harp of Creation
inventory.description: Valdris's Silver Harp of Creation. Its strings are spun from light; when played, reality briefly writes itself.

inventory.name: Golden Trumpet of Change
inventory.description: Zephyros's trumpet. Its note is the note of transformation - nothing that hears it stays the same.

inventory.name: Lute of Whispering Shadows
inventory.description: Nyxara's lute. Its strings are woven of void; it plays only what has been forgotten.

inventory.name: Crystal Flute of Wisdom
inventory.description: Thessarian's flute. Each note is a paradox resolved; each silence is a question answered.
